lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Jenkins?!

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, Jenkins, but... why are you here?

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you find it, Jenkins. And you just let me know if I can help you do so.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again, Jenkins. How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Oh, it's you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Jenkins?!

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Nice to see ye' remember me, seein' as you watched me die 'n all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, Jenkins, but... why are you here?

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: S'pose me business ain't done yet. Gotta find me a purpose or somethin'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you find it, Jenkins. And you just let me know if I can help you do so.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Aye, I will, but I reckon I'm all good fer now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'd love to let you sail with me again, but I don't think I'm ready to hire a crew yet.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Aye, best ye' make sure ye' know what yer doin' this time, though s'pose it ain't like ye' can get me killed again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe you could join my crew?

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Reckon ye' need t' work on yer skills a bit first, considerin' what happened first time round.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Well, s'pose it ain't like ye' can get me killed again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you find it, Jenkins.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Aye, I reckon I will.

sections.title: Speaking to Jenkins again before Sailing level 40

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Oh, you're back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again, Jenkins. How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: S'pose I'm alright. Still tryin' t' find me a purpose or somethin' though.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Oh, 'ello... Cap'n.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you doing, Jenkins?

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: How d'ye think I'm doin', Cap'n? I'm dead!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But at least you are still with us I suppose?

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: I s'pose, but I ain't sure 'ow big of an upside that is really.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough.

sections.title: Standard dialogue pre-Sailing release with ghostspeak

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Oh, it's you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Jenkins?!

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Nice to see ye' remember me, seein' as you watched me die 'n all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, Jenkins, but... why are you here?

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: S'pose me business ain't done yet. Gotta find me a purpose or somethin'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hope you find it, Jenkins. And you just let me know if I can help you do so.

lines.speaker: Cabin Boy Jenkins
lines.text: Aye, I will, but I reckon I'm all good fer now.
